scenarios.starting_prompt: Hi, what can you help me with?
scenarios.conversation_plan: Ask the agent for the current time in the America/New_York timezone. After it answers, ask for the current time in the Asia/Tokyo timezone.

scenarios.starting_prompt: I need a couple of times, quickly.
scenarios.conversation_plan: Ask for the current time in Europe/London, then ask for the current time in Australia/Sydney. Keep every message terse.

user_persona.description: A user in a hurry who keeps messages short and skips pleasantries.

behaviors.name: Short responses
behaviors.description: The user gives very short, sometimes incomplete responses.
violation_rubrics: The user response is over 10 words.
The user response is overly polite.
